papers_mined.title: Komodo dragon (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Ambush + bite-and-wait predation; venom inhibits clotting, lowers BP, induces paralysis + hypothermia; tracks weakening prey over hours-days via olfactory.

papers_mined.title: Central role venom predation Varanus komodoensis PMC
papers_mined.note: Venom + bacteria dual-threat — venom weakens prey + bacteria cause secondary infection; bite-and-wait coevolved with prey-tracking olfactory system.

papers_mined.title: Komodo Dragon Venom Research Nat Geo
papers_mined.note: Genetic studies — venom evolved independently from snake venom; both from ancestral salivary proteins.

papers_mined.title: Komodo Dragons Use Venom Kill Prey Slowly
papers_mined.note: Single quick bite then back-off; passive tracking through prey-population for hours-days; minimizes attacker risk.
